parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: 1239839M1 - Ingredients/Bahan-Bahan: Aqua/Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Dimethicone, Glycol Distearate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Ci 60730 / Ext. Violet 2, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Coco-Betaine, Cocos Nucifera Oil/Coconut Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Steareth-6, Phenoxyethanol, Acetic Acid, Peg-100 Stearate, Trideceth-10, Trideceth-3, Salicylic Acid, Limonene, Fumaric Acid, Amodimethicone, Carbomer, Citric Acid, Hexylene Glycol, Glycerin, Fragrance. (F.I.L. Y70013577/1).
metaData.Key Information:
The science of dehydrated hair - This is a sign that the hair lacks nutrition and moisture. L’Oreal laboratories has developed a 72 hour^ moisture replenishing shampoo enriched with Hyaluronic Acid. Naturally, Hyaluronic Acid is found in the human body, this molecule is known to hold more water than its own weight up to 1000x which can help maintain hair moisture.

Proven Results*
Hyaluronic acid instantly fills hair with shinier moisture^^, 10x* more moisture and volume without making it limp**.

Network Recommendations:
1. Shampoo - Cleans and maintains moisture.
2. Conditioner - Smoothes and locks hair moisture.
3. Night cream – 4x^^^ more hydrating without making hair limp. Work while you sleep.
metaData.Preparation:
Method of use:
Use on damp, damp hair, massage the head gently and rinse afterwards. If it comes into contact with eyes, rinse immediately using clean water.

If in eyes, wash out immediately with water

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Cocamide Dea, Polyquaternium-7, Glycol Distearate, Dimethiconol, Tea-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Laureth-23, Phenoxyethanol and Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Chloride, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Hydrolyzed Soy Protein, Fragrance, Hydroxyethyl Urea, Panthenol, Niacinamide, Sodium Benzoate, Polyquaternium-10, Citric Acid, Menthol, Amla Extract, Soapnut Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Jojoba Oil, Argan Oil, Avocado Oil, Grapeseed Oil, Lavender Oil
metaData.Key Information:
• Gently cleanses the scalp, strengthens weak hair, and promotes healthy hair growth.
• Maintaining a clean scalp helps enhances the effectiveness of topical hair loss treatments.
• Makes hair more manageable, adds body and volume.
• Suitable for everyday use.
metaData.Preparation:
Wet hair with water. Lather, apply shampoo on hair and gently massage scalp with your fingertips. Rinse thoroughly.

• Avoid contact with eyes.
• If contact occurs, rinse immediately with water. Consult doctor if discomfort occurs.
